findings.summary: SFIO has opened an investigation into Greenfield Pharma Industries Pvt Ltd (Case No. SFIO/2024/HYD/042) for suspected financial irregularities and circular trading through shell entities.
findings.source_title: SFIO Investigation Orders - Ministry of Corporate Affairs
findings.raw_snippet: SFIO/2024/HYD/042: Investigation ordered u/s 212 of Companies Act, 2013 into affairs of Greenfield Pharma Industries Pvt Ltd, Hyderabad.

findings.summary: Two IPC cases registered against promoter Suresh Kumar Reddy — FIR 482/2024 (cheating u/s 420) and FIR 503/2024 (forgery u/s 468) at Cyberabad Police Station.
findings.raw_snippet: FIR 482/2024 and FIR 503/2024 registered at Cyberabad PS. Accused: Suresh Kumar Reddy, Director of Greenfield Pharma Industries.

findings.summary: GST authorities detected circular invoice chain involving Greenfield Pharma, Helix Chemicals, Indus Pharma Traders, and Jupiter Chemical Suppliers. Total fraudulent ITC claim estimated at ₹1.5 crore.
findings.source_title: Hyderabad Pharma Firm Under GST Scanner for Circular Trading
findings.raw_snippet: GST intelligence officers uncovered a 4-entity circular trading ring involving Greenfield Pharma and three related/shell companies in Hyderabad.

findings.summary: Greenfield Pharma's bank account with State Bank of India shows NPA classification since March 2024, with 120+ days past due on term loan facility.
findings.source_title: MSME NPAs Rise in Pharma Sector
findings.raw_snippet: Several Hyderabad-based pharma MSMEs including Greenfield Pharma reported NPA classification. DPD exceeding 90 days.

findings.summary: Pharmaceutical chemicals manufacturing capacity utilization across Telangana SMEs dropped to 30-40% range amid raw material cost pressures.
findings.source_title: Pharma MSME Sector Faces Capacity Headwinds
findings.raw_snippet: Telangana pharma SMEs operating at sub-40% capacity utilization. Input cost inflation and API pricing pressure cited as primary causes.
